name: edbt-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for EDBT (International Conference on Extending Database Technology), the European database-systems flagship co-located with ICDT and published open-access on OpenProceedings.org: navigating the multiple-cycle rolling submission model, the in-cycle revise-and-resubmit decision, Microsoft CMT submission, Regular / Experiments-&-Analysis / Vision paper shapes, the CC-BY-NC-ND open-access proceedings, database-systems reproducibility, and routing against SIGMOD/VLDB/ICDE/ICDT. Grounded in the EDBT/ICDT 2026 Tampere calls, the EDBT 2027 cycle deadlines, OpenProceedings.org, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
